scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix services/auth-service && npm install --prefix services/scheduling-service && npm install --prefix services/notification-service && npm install --prefix web
scripts.test: npm test --prefix services/auth-service && npm test --prefix services/scheduling-service && npm test --prefix services/notification-service
scripts.test:bdd: npm run test:bdd --prefix services/auth-service && npm run test:bdd --prefix services/scheduling-service && npm run test:bdd --prefix services/notification-service
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix services/auth-service && npm run build --prefix services/scheduling-service && npm run build --prefix services/notification-service && npm run build --prefix web
